class.name: FestivalEvent
class.brief_description: A scripted game event happening at a location with a cast of NPCs.
class.description: Events describe something that happens somewhere on the island, optionally fired by a specific dialogue interaction: [member trigger_npc_id] and [member trigger_dialogue_id] match an interaction id carried in the triggering NPC's profile. [member script_text] is authored prose or pseudo-script from Secret Census, not executable code.

members.member: The raw Secret Census source record, kept so no exported detail is lost.
Ids of the NPCs taking part in the event.
Free-form game-state labels the event applies to.
Unique identifier used by the registry and plot hook links.
If [code]true[/code], the event is part of the main progression path.
Id of the [FestivalLocation] where the event takes place.
Authored prose/pseudo-script describing the event beat by beat. Not executable code.
Id of the dialogue interaction (in the trigger NPC's profile) that fires the event, or empty.
Id of the NPC whose dialogue fires the event, or empty.
